description: A retailer is returning unsold merchandise at the end of a season, as allowed by their contract.

nodes.task_description: The retailer requests a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA).

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an RMA in the system and provides the RMA number to the retailer.

nodes.task_description: When the returned goods arrive, inspect them to ensure they are in sellable condition.

expected_outcome.value: A warehouse worker inspects the items and confirms they are undamaged.

nodes.task_description: Add the returned items back into inventory.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the inventory levels for the returned items.

nodes.task_description: Issue a credit memo to the retailer's account for the value of the returned goods.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully credits the retailer's account.
